Video.summary: Chef Marcela Valladolid gives Matthew a hands-on lesson in crafting the perfect taco and salsa.

Video.title: Melba Wilson: A Harlem Icon

Video.title: The Science Behind Kitchens & Bedrooms

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch transforms everything from small rooms to outdoor spaces.
Video.title: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living

Image.alt: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living

Video.summary: Julie Couch breaks down the basic equations for taking the stress out of design.
Video.title: The Laws of Lighting & Color

Video.summary: Margot and Josh spent years perfecting every room in the house but overlooked their bedroom.
Video.title: Margot & Josh’s Teal Transformation

Video.summary: Matthew meets Ethiopian-born Chef Fariyal Abdullahi and gets a hands-on lesson in creating Doro Wat.
Video.title: Fariyal Abdullahi: From Ethiopia to the Met Gala

Video.summary: Sabrina gets inspired with expert insights from Lewis Howes, Catherine McCord, and Justina Blakeney.
Video.title: Redesign Your Life

Video.summary: Fran and Theresa want to create a safe, family-friendly haven for their 13 grandkids.
Video.title: Fran & Theresa’s Family-Friendly Haven

Video.summary: Captain Boomies meets Tom Biddix—a yachtsman who helped design the demo yacht they take for a spin.
Video.title: Tom's "Team Monarch"

Video.summary: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.
Video.title: The Gambin's "Offline"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies gets a look at the Pipe Dream - equal parts sport machine and floating celebration.
Video.title: Captain Cholly's "Pipe Dream"

Video.summary: Sabrina's expert guests guide her on a personal journey to wellness from the inside out.
Video.title: Whole Body, Mind & Spirit

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch gives you a personal tour of her timeless Brentwood, TN home.
Video.title: Designer's Dwelling: Family-Friendly Glam

Video.summary: Darrel and Patrice of Maxam Hotels embark on an epic journey to build a tiny home resort.
Video.title: The Blueprint

Video.summary: Darrel and Patrice begin construction, laying the foundation for the resort.
Video.title: Foundations

Video.summary: The tension begins to mount as the deadline looms larger.
Video.title: The Drop

Video.summary: It’s all hands-on deck at the resort and the team is working around the clock.
Video.title: Down to the Wire

Video.summary: With power finally in place, the Maxams begin to ready the resort for opening.
Video.title: Sewing Up Loose Ends

Video.summary: The town of Sodus shows up as the Maxams unveil The Finger Lakes Treehouse Resort.
Video.title: Ribbon Cutting

Video.summary: Los Angeles-based designer, Eddie Mickenberg welcomes you into this Encino, California home.
Video.title: Moody & Masculine Mid-Century Style

Video.summary: Acrylic painter Monique Cleveland creates an abstract floral to symbolize marriage, prosperity and love.
Video.title: A Fusion in Floral

Video.summary: Finding space for self-care can be hard but Terri Cole, Cat Cora and Dr. Ramani are here to help!
Video.title: Creating Space: Boundaries in Everyday Life

Image.alt: Creating Space: Boundaries in Everyday Life
Creating Space: Boundaries in Everyday Life
Creating Space: Boundaries in Everyday Life

Video.summary: UNC Center Armando Bacot gets a home makeover with the help of designer-in-training, Chloe Barbu.
Video.title: Armando Bacot's Luxe Loft

Video.summary: Kylie and Charli bring smart solutions, bold materials, and thoughtful styling to a first home.
Video.title: Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined

Image.alt: Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined
Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined

Video.summary: Join Sabrina for a feast for the eyes, body, and soul with laughs and great conversation.
Video.title: Cocina De Sabrina

Video.summary: Amy teams up with Bill McCallum to transform a 1920’s bungalow that has been “remuddled” over the years.
Video.title: 1920's Bizarre Bungalow

Video.summary: Amy turns a tiny condo into a home that supports Sandra's love for cooking and entertaining.
Video.title: Culinary Condo Remodel

Video.summary: Step inside this cozy, casual cottage with a distinctly feminine flair.
Video.title: Feminine Casual Cottage

Video.summary: Charli and Kylie transform Irene’s closet and turn her bedroom into a beautiful retreat.
Video.title: Shalese + Irene: A Bedroom That Is Just Right

Image.alt: Shalese + Irene: A Bedroom That Is Just Right
Shalese + Irene: A Bedroom That Is Just Right
Shalese + Irene: A Bedroom That Is Just Right

Video.summary: Painter William Paul Thomas creates a portrait that fuses an upcoming film narrative with his powerful style.
Video.title: The Complexion of Compassion

Video.summary: Muralist J Massullo creates a fantastical scene that is organic, colorful and layered with amazing detail.
Video.title: Roshambo’s Skeleton Crew
